banner.text: ⚡ Limited-Time Offer: Flat 30% OFF on all software & plans. Use coupon code [ VSO30 ]. Valid for next 48 hours only.

announcement.title: ⚡ Flash Sale – Flat 30% OFF (48 Hours Only)
